raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because my card issuer has failed to fully resolve fraudulent charges on my account despite multiple phone calls. 

Between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>, a merchant called XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX  made XXXX unauthorized charges on my card totaling {$1300.00}. I did not authorize any of these transactions. The charges were repetitive, mostly {$19.00} each, sometimes multiple per day, which is a clear pattern of fraud. 

After I reported the fraud, the charges continued for weeks. The issuer did not block the merchant or take any action to prevent the fraud from recurring while I was actively disputing it. 

On XX/XX/year>, the issuer processed a partial refund of XXXX credits at {$19.00} each, totaling {$670.00}. This only covered roughly half the fraudulent transactions. XXXX charges totaling {$630.00} remain unrefunded, including XXXX charge of {$9.00} and XXXX of {$29.00} that were not addressed at all. 

I have called multiple times to resolve this and each time I am met with customer service representatives who are unhelpful and difficult to communicate with, they barely speak English. Nobody seems willing or able to fix the problem. 

I am requesting a full refund of the remaining {$630.00} in fraudulent charges and any interest charged related to my account. The issuer has already acknowledged the fraud by issuing partial refunds but has not resolved the matter in full.
